observations.archetype_gloss: Represents the darker, unrefilled aspect of the self, embodying emptiness and internal void
observations.summary: Dan's shadow is depicted as large and hunched, appearing as a man emptied out and not refilled, symbolizing a fragmented or depleted inner self struggling with internal void.

evidence.quote: His shadow, thrown large and hunched by the dying light, looked like a man who had been emptied out and not quite refilled.

accepted_observations.summary: Dan's shadow is depicted as large and hunched, appearing as a man emptied out and not refilled, symbolizing a fragmented or depleted inner self struggling with internal void.

evidence.quote: His shadow, thrown large and hunched by the dying light, looked like a man who had been emptied out and not quite refilled.
